metamorphic_relations.name: Semantic Equivalence Consistency
metamorphic_relations.description: If two queries are semantically equivalent, their top-K results should have ≥80% overlap
metamorphic_relations.input_transformation: Replace query with a semantically equivalent paraphrase
metamorphic_relations.test_strategy: Generate positive pairs as query pairs; measure result set overlap

metamorphic_relations.name: Semantic Distance Monotonicity
metamorphic_relations.description: If doc A is semantically closer to query Q than doc B, rank(A) must be better than rank(B)
metamorphic_relations.input_transformation: Compare two documents with known relative semantic distances to a query
metamorphic_relations.test_strategy: Use ground-truth labeled pairs; verify ranking order

metamorphic_relations.name: Hard Negative Discrimination
metamorphic_relations.description: Hard negative pairs (surface-similar but semantically different) should NOT appear as top-1 results for each other
metamorphic_relations.input_transformation: Use text_a as query, search for text_b
metamorphic_relations.expected_output_property: rank(text_b) > K/2 when searching with text_a (not in top half)
metamorphic_relations.test_strategy: Use hard_negative pairs; search text_a for text_b and verify rank

metamorphic_relations.name: Negative Pair Rejection
metamorphic_relations.description: Semantically dissimilar texts should not appear in each other's top-K results
metamorphic_relations.input_transformation: Use text_a as query, check if text_b appears in top-K
metamorphic_relations.expected_output_property: text_b NOT in top-K results when searching with text_a
metamorphic_relations.test_strategy: Use negative pairs; verify neither text appears in the other's top-K

metamorphic_relations.name: Distance Symmetry
metamorphic_relations.description: Distance(A, B) should approximately equal Distance(B, A)
metamorphic_relations.test_strategy: Search both directions; compare relative rankings
